evals.prompt: Generate a presentation using the content from eval/content/pro-core.md. Use Pro mode with Obsidian theme. Include the 3 image slides using images from eval/assets/ (screenshot.svg, logo.svg, hero.svg). 13 slides total.
evals.expected_output: Obsidian theme with all core components: title, statement, flip cards, architecture flow, code block, stats, VS compare, timeline, table, 3 image variants, CTA. Content-driven layouts, not cycling through components in order.

evals.prompt: Generate a presentation using the content from eval/content/pro-core.md. Use Pro mode with Excalidraw Light theme. Include the 3 image slides using images from eval/assets/. 13 slides total.
evals.expected_output: Excalidraw Light theme: Caveat font, CSS hachure fills, 14px rounded corners, offset drop shadows. Same components as Obsidian but with hand-drawn aesthetic.

evals.prompt: Generate a presentation using the content from eval/content/pro-core.md. Use Pro mode with Binary Architect theme. Include the 3 image slides using images from eval/assets/. 13 slides total.
evals.expected_output: Binary Architect theme: 0px border-radius, grid overlay, neon green accents, monospaced body text, uppercase headings. Sharp hacker-elite aesthetic.

evals.prompt: Generate a presentation using the content from eval/content/pro-charts.md. Use Pro mode with Obsidian theme. 6 slides with 4 Chart.js charts (bar, line, pie, doughnut).
evals.expected_output: All 4 charts render correctly with theme-aware colors. Charts have proper containers, responsive sizing, and animate on slide entry.

evals.prompt: Generate a presentation using the content from eval/content/pro-mermaid.md. Use Pro mode with Obsidian theme. 6 slides with 3 Mermaid diagrams (flowchart TD, sequence, mind map). Read references/libraries.md for Mermaid integration requirements.
evals.expected_output: Mermaid diagrams in .mermaid-wrap containers with background, border, border-radius. Flowchart uses TD (not LR). themeVariables match Obsidian palette. fontSize 18px+. Diagram lightbox with +/- zoom buttons.

evals.prompt: Generate a 6-slide pitch deck for 'Aura' using the content from eval/content/vibe-aura.md. Use Vibe mode with Bold Signal preset.
evals.expected_output: Bold Signal: Archivo Black font, colored card focal points on dark gradient, section numbers. viewport-base.css included, no conflicting .slide redefinition. All CSS generated from scratch.

evals.prompt: Generate a 6-slide pitch deck for 'Aura' using the content from eval/content/vibe-aura.md. Use Vibe mode with Dark Botanical preset.
evals.expected_output: Dark Botanical: Cormorant serif, warm accents (pink, gold, terracotta), abstract gradient circles. viewport-base.css included, no conflicting .slide redefinition.

evals.prompt: Generate a 6-slide pitch deck for 'Aura' using the content from eval/content/vibe-aura.md. Use Vibe mode with Swiss Modern preset.
evals.expected_output: Swiss Modern: Archivo + Nunito, white/black/red palette, visible grid, asymmetric layouts, geometric shapes. viewport-base.css included, no conflicting .slide redefinition.

evals.prompt: Generate a 6-slide pitch deck for 'Aura' using the content from eval/content/vibe-aura.md. Use Vibe mode with Creative Voltage preset.
evals.expected_output: Creative Voltage: Syne + Space Mono, electric blue + neon yellow, halftone textures. viewport-base.css included, no conflicting .slide redefinition.

evals.prompt: Generate a 6-slide pitch deck for 'Aura' using the content from eval/content/vibe-aura.md. Use Vibe mode with Notebook Tabs preset.
evals.expected_output: Notebook Tabs: Bodoni Moda + DM Sans, cream paper card on dark bg, colorful section tabs, binder holes. viewport-base.css included, no conflicting .slide redefinition.

evals.prompt: Generate a 6-slide pitch deck for 'Aura' using the content from eval/content/vibe-aura.md. Use Vibe mode with Vintage Editorial preset.
evals.expected_output: Vintage Editorial: Fraunces + Work Sans, cream bg, geometric shapes (circle + line + dot), bold bordered CTA. viewport-base.css included, no conflicting .slide redefinition.

evals.prompt: Generate an 8-slide presentation using the content from eval/content/vibe-devops.md. Use Vibe mode with Excalidraw Light preset. Pure CSS hand-drawn aesthetic — no Rough.js.
evals.expected_output: Excalidraw Light CSS-only: Caveat font, CSS hachure fills on cards (14px border-radius), offset drop shadows, CSS-drawn arrows and connectors. No Rough.js CDN. Hand-drawn aesthetic achieved entirely with CSS.
